summary: Backend-only verification for iteration 14 (real YouTube thumbnails per place). Tested /api/discover for Paris/cafe and Tokyo/restaurant plus /api/enrich for Bar Basso. All checks passed: each discover call returns 6 places with UNIQUE i.ytimg.com images and 1 real video each; enrich updates image/hero_image to i.ytimg.com and returns 3 real videos.
passed: POST /api/discover {city:Paris,category:cafe} -> 200, 6 places, 6/6 unique images, all start with https://i.ytimg.com/vi/, each place has videos[1]
POST /api/discover {city:Tokyo,category:restaurant} -> 200, 6 places, 6/6 unique images, all i.ytimg.com, each has videos[1]
POST /api/enrich/{Bar Basso id} -> 200, image & hero_image updated to https://i.ytimg.com/vi/poWhzmMdv0M/hqdefault.jpg, videos=3 real YouTube results
Discover video titles are contextually relevant (e.g., 'Best Coffee in Paris? | Télescope Café')
notes: Frontend regression checks (home cards, /place/{id} map + video modal) were NOT executed per 'testing_type: backend only' instruction from main agent.
